title: 日本ダービーの後に・その瞳には何が

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Dammit!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! I looooost!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I might've lost, but... but...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm not giving up! I'm gonna get stronger!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to win so badly—I ran my heart out! But
Taishin and Hayahide ran their hearts out too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: After all that, I still lost, and that hurts! But it's because it hurts that I'll train to get even faster!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll put everything I have into it, even this pain I
feel! I'm going run even fasteeeer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! The Kikuka Sho will be miiiiine!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Ticket... She lost the race of her dreams, but
she's already working toward her next goal.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Her presence is overwhelming...)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket and Taishin have grown tremendously since
fully realizing their abilities...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I must recalculate my strategy right away!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey...

Sure, she didn't win, but she still made it on the
scoreboard. That's an achievement in and of
itself.
Besides...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph. I know.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I refuse to let anyone say things are over for me
just 'cause I lost here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not when I still have the Kikuka Sho to win!

The finale of the Triple Crown tour, the Kikuka
Sho, awaits us next.

She reaffirms her dedication to keep pushing on,
so she can seize the next crown.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I have to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: As long as I win, then one day...
